title: Trusted Delivery, Supply Chain, Progressive Release, and Rollback · Product Forensics
summary: A preserved decision record for trusted delivery, supply chain, progressive release, and rollback contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in trusted progressive delivery dossier and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal deb…
objectives: Bind reviewed source, protected workflow, isolated builder, inputs, dependencies, output digest, provenance, and verification.
Maintain current direct, transitive, generated, container, service, data, model, and license inventory with vulnerability ownership.
Constrain events, untrusted input, tokens, OIDC claims, secrets, runners, caches, environments, approvals, and audit evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Source Build Provenance
steps.instruction:
debug case — Automation rebuilds mutable inputs with broad secrets in each environment, then moves full traffic before provenance, guardrails, or rollback are verified. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Bind reviewed source, protected workflow, isolated builder, inputs, dependencies, output digest, provenance, and verification.

Inspect the Source Build Provenance trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Source Build Provenance.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for bind reviewed source, protected workflow, isolated builder, inputs, dependencies, output digest, provenance, and verification. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Source Build Provenance, keep Source Build Provenance connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Source Build Provenance, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Source Build Provenance, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Source Build Provenance precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Source Build Provenance, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: Automation rebuilds mutable inputs with broad secrets in each environment, then moves full traffic before provenance, guardrails, or rollback are verified. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Bind reviewed source, protected workflow, isolated builder, inputs, dependencies, output digest, provenance, and verification.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Source Build Provenance, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: A checksum proves who built an artifact and from which source.

stimulus.title: Source Build Provenance case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Automation rebuilds mutable inputs with broad secrets in each environment, then moves full traffic before provenance, guardrails, or rollback are verified. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Bind reviewed source, protected workflow, isolated builder, inputs, dependencies, output digest, provenance, and verification.

lines.label: risk

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Bind reviewed source, protected workflow, isolated builder, inputs, dependencies, output digest, provenance, and verification. Artifact under review: trusted progressive delivery dossier.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the inspect the failure record evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Source Build Provenance, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Rollback Rollforward
steps.instruction:

The debug variation 4 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. content.title: Evidence defense
